channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Ornament flytipped, 23rd April
item.description:
What looks like a Christmas display dumped behind green comms unit on Hardings Lane near junction with Lennard Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hardings Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Full litter bin, 23rd April
item.description:
Full litter bin. Please bring this to the attention of the contract monitoring officer as this bin is regularly overlooked and I have reported it several times recently. Thankyou

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on floor no access for prams or wheelchair users, 23rd April
item.description:
There is a overflowing bin shed which has caused foxes to pull out rubbish along the path outside the flats there is used dirty nappys/ food and general waste blocking access to the flats for prams and wheelchair users.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water leak causing slime on pavement, 23rd April
item.description:
There is a water leak that is getting worse and causing slime across the full width of the pavement. This is a severe slip hazard and in order to avoid it, pedestrians have to walk in the road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Flaxton Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead hedgehog, 23rd April
item.description:
Dead hedgehog. Boxed and double bagged. Notified Greenwich Wildlife.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive rubbish thrown everywhere, 23rd April
item.description:
There is an enormous amount of rubbish and litter all over the street and pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Adolphus Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 188 Shaftesbury Ave, London WC2H 8JB, 23rd April
item.description:
Pole has been leaning for some time now possibly due to vehicles hitting it. However today i found it leaning even more making me worried that it might fall and hurt someone at any moment.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Monmouth Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone living in broken garage, 23rd April
item.description:
For past few days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Howard Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive amount of rubbish all over the road, 23rd April
item.description:
Road is heavily polluted with litter in both directions and both sides including sidewalks and alleyways. This is a permanent ongoing issue caused by social housing properties incorrectly disposing of their rubbish bins.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maiden Lane, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filthy street, 23rd April
item.description:
Street needs sweeping. Been like this for a week. No sign of street cleaner here for weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At rear 96 Lucey Way, 23rd April
item.description:
1 week's build up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Well Rd and East Heath Rd, 23rd April
item.description:
Granite slab has been knocked over. It is incredibly heavy and needs a crew to right it so it is vertical again. Dangerous obstruction. Beautiful when sighted. A heavy vehicle reversed into it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17-20, Well Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of furniture on Crampton street, 23rd April
item.description:
A whole load of furniture has, this morning, been dumped right outside the entry way to 136-150 Crampton street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Crampton Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At end Woolstaplers Way SE16 3UU, 23rd April
item.description:
2 weeks dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rouel Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rolls of fake grass and rubbish on pavement, 23rd April
item.description:
Dumped rolls of fake grass and rubbish on pavement outside our business address

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thomas Road, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive advert on a car, 23rd April
item.description:
This car has a absolutely high sign attached to the roof - it parks at various locations around the borough near schools (advertising personal tuition services) - dumps the car for months on end, taking up space, making the area look scruffy, and causing a massive distraction for drivers. Although it’s parked legally, it’s clearly being used as a static advert boarding rather than as a vehicle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 153, Blackfen Road, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unauthorised dumping of furniture, 23rd April
item.description:
Unauthorised dumping of furniture blocking the shop entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fences left in the Garden, 23rd April
item.description:
Fences left in the Garden

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Merbury Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 23rd April
item.description:
Alot of cardboard and Packaging boxes and general waste has been left on the pavement blocking access please remove asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakhurst Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grazeley Close not swept, 23rd April
item.description:
Grazeley Close has not been swept properly
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grazeley Close, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
